heading: Protection of Federal Government buildings in District of Columbia
label: 8102 Protection of Federal Government buildings in District of Columbia
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)810240:137., , .Pub. L. 104–132, title VIII, § 803110 Stat. 1305Apr. 24, 1996
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)810240:137., , .Pub. L. 104–132, title VIII, § 803110 Stat. 1305Apr. 24, 1996

children.label: A
children.text: at least partly owned or possessed by, or leased to, the Federal Government; and

children.label: B
children.text: used by law enforcement authorities subject to their jurisdiction; and
a person or entity from conducting business on property immediately adjacent to a building described in paragraph (1).
